title: lasianthus fordii var. microphyllus
intro: Lasianthus fordii var. microphyllus, also known as the Taiwan Lasianthus, is a small shrub native to China and Taiwan, belonging to the family Theaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving immune function, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
